brief: Opportunities are heavily concentrated in Brooklyn infill lots zoned R7A and R7-2, where combining 485-x tax exemptions with Section 8 VPS rents yields strong Cash-on-Cash returns up to 13.7%. Out of 921 qualified lots screened, city-owned parcels (289 total) present substantial equity upside with walk-away land values well above estimated comp land costs. Bronx program plays offer developer fees via ELLA/4% LIHTC stacks, but show constrained land pricing relative to market-tier Brooklyn and Queens targets.

targets.play: Develop a 12-unit residential project leveraging the 485-x tax exemption and Section 8 VPS rents to achieve a 13.7% Cash-on-Cash return.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $591,738 against a $1,588,048 walk-away limit, providing $996,310 in valuation headroom.
targets.risk: Navigating the public HPD/EDC disposition RFP process for city-owned land and performing standard R7A zoning verification.

targets.play: Construct a 10-unit infill development under R7-2 zoning using the 485-x and Section 8 VPS structure to deliver a 12.7% Cash-on-Cash yield.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $569,141 versus a $1,525,802 walk-away threshold, yielding $956,661 in land price headroom.
targets.risk: City-owned HPD disposition requirements and site condition diligence.

targets.play: Build a 14-unit R7A project via 485-x and Section 8 VPS rents targeting a 12.4% Cash-on-Cash return, with potential to aggregate adjacent city-owned parcels.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $690,612 compared to a $1,760,767 walk-away land cap, leaving $1,070,155 in headroom.
targets.risk: HPD disposition timeline and verifying site conditions across surrounding contiguous lots on Gerry and Bartlett Streets.

targets.play: Execute a 14-unit R6A development in Queens utilizing 485-x tax incentives and Section 8 VPS rents for an 11.2% Cash-on-Cash return.
targets.negotiation: Estimated land cost of $622,014 against a $1,531,605 walk-away limit, giving $909,591 in headroom.
targets.risk: HPD disposition process execution and site condition diligence.

process_note: These initial underwriting figures are screening estimates pending full physical and legal diligence, and acquiring these city-owned parcels requires winning HPD/EDC RFP dispositions rather than executing private seller purchases.
disclaimer: AI interpretation of the engine's real screening output. Estimates pending diligence — not investment advice.
